context.projectOverview: agent-bober chat session layer, final sprint. Sprint 4 adds STEER: a /stop command (and inspect) that kills a spawned run by PID, using the PidSidecar recorded in Sprint 2 (.bober/chat/<sessionId>.pids.json maps runId->{pid,task,spawnedAt}).

completedSprints.title: Chat REPL
completedSprints.summary: src/chat/ module + chat role + bober chat command; ConversationStore, RosterReader, slash-commands (/runs /help /exit).

completedSprints.title: Detached spawn + --run-id
completedSprints.summary: RunSpawner launches detached bober run with session runId; PidSidecar persists runId->{pid,task,spawnedAt} at .bober/chat/<sessionId>.pids.json.

completedSprints.title: Completion weaving
completedSprints.summary: CompletionTailer tails history.jsonl rotation-safely; ChatSession weaves '[run <id> finished]' notices.
